growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: corkrey.
growth_records.notes: growth_rate_per_h computed as ln(2)/doubling_time_h. Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.cite: Ferreira et al. γ-proteobacteria eject their polar flagella under nutrient depletion, retaining flagellar motor relic structures. PLoS Biology (2019). DOI:10.1371/journal.pbio.3000165. [PMC6424402]
growth_records.snippet: early growth-stage (low OD) cells were moved into spent medium and grown for one doubling time from OD 0.2 to 0.4 (doubling time in fresh LB = 19 minutes and in spent medium = 38 minutes)
growth_records.notes: Doubling time of 19 minutes explicitly reported for P. shigelloides growing in fresh LB (37C, aerobic, 200 RPM shaking). growth_rate_per_h = ln2/(19/60 h) = 0.693/0.3167h = 2.19/h.

growth_records.cite: Ferreira et al. γ-proteobacteria eject their polar flagella under nutrient depletion, retaining flagellar motor relic structures. PLoS Biology (2019). DOI:10.1371/journal.pbio.3000165. [PMC6424402]
growth_records.snippet: doubling time in fresh LB = 19 minutes and in spent medium = 38 minutes; the doubling rate was 2-fold lower for low cell density cells transferred to spent medium compared to those transferred to fresh LB
growth_records.notes: Doubling time of 38 minutes explicitly reported for P. shigelloides transferred from fresh LB into P. shigelloides-conditioned (nutrient-depleted) spent LB medium, 37C, aerobic. growth_rate_per_h = ln2/(38/60 h) = 0.693/0.6333h = 1.09/h.
